news.title: Big Hits: Aldoro Resources, Pantoro Gold and Mithril Silver & Gold fire up
news.snippet: Bulls N’ Bears Big Hits looks at big drill hits recently reported to the ASX, led by Aldoro Resources, followed by Pantoro Gold and Mithril Silver & Gold.

news.title: Jobless rate lifts ASX to six-week high
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has recorded its best day in six weeks, as higher jobless figures spark investor relief that rate hikes may be off the table.

news.title: ‘Ugly’: Jobless rate up, 18.5k jobs lost
news.snippet: Australia’s latest unemployment rate has been revealed as inflation bites businesses and slashes margins.

news.title: ASX Runners of the Week: Hydrix, KTEK Aerosystems, AnteoTech & Castle
news.snippet: The Bulls N’ Bears ASX Runner of the Week is… Hydrix Limited, which surged after unveiling a strategic pivot into counter-drone defence technology through a deal with NIOA Group.

news.title: ‘Like trying to become a gyros chain in Athens’: What went wrong for GyG in America
news.snippet: Private equity and investment bankers convinced Aussies they could sell burritos to the Yanks – and they swallowed it.

news.title: Aussie sharemarket steadies for weekly gain
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has pushed through choppy financial seas to achieve a stabilising weekly gain.

news.title: ‘No brain cells’: CGT could hit shares at 60pc
news.snippet: A former Treasury official has issued a bombshell warning that Aussies could see their actual tax rate rocket to 60 per cent under the CGT changes.

news.title: Dateline taps global project manager for California gold push
news.snippet: Dateline Resources has secured global project powerhouse Alvarez & Marsal to manage construction and accelerate development at its Colosseum gold mine.

news.title: ‘I should have been dead’: He co-founded a $4.2b empire but has given it up to become a priest
news.snippet: Scott Borba was living the high life until one night at a party at his newly renovated house in the Hollywood Hills, he looked around and questioned everything.

news.title: Guzman founder moved to Chicago to save its US dream. It wasn’t enough
news.snippet: The Australian-founded Mexican chain has spent six years and more than $100 million on its US expansion, but on Friday announced it was shutting down all stores in the country.

news.title: Flagship bags A$2.75M for multi-million-ounce Chilean gold project
news.snippet: Flagship Minerals has secured A$2.75M in a strategic placement to accelerate development studies at its 2.1-million-ounce Isidora gold project in Chile.
